report.summary: Community growth cycle v22: Drafted 4 social posts (CLARITY Act bipartisan breakthrough thread, BTC $71K relief rally outlook, new guides content drop, Solana stablecoin dominance thread), newsletter v17 for Thu Mar 27, Discord/TG evening update, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (CLARITY Act Bipartisan Deal + BTC Relief Rally $71K). Market: BTC $71,043 (+3.79% relief rally), ETH +5.16%, F&G recovering 11→33, CLARITY Act Tillis-Alsobrooks bipartisan deal unlocks stablecoin yield framework (passive yield banned, activity rewards allowed), stablecoins $312B ATH, Solana stablecoin supply $15.7B ATH with 36% global tx volume, 718 published pages with 4 remaining in queue.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #79: CLARITY Act Bipartisan Breakthrough Thread (4 parts) — 'The CLARITY Act was stuck for months. One bipartisan deal just changed everything.' Tillis-Alsobrooks compromise details: passive yield banned, activity rewards allowed, Senate Banking markup next, industry reviewing language, must pass by May. Links to crypto-regulations-2026 guide (Schedule Wed Mar 25 10AM)

Tweet #80: BTC Relief Rally Market Outlook — '$71,043. BTC just reclaimed $71K with a 3.79% relief rally while F&G is still at 33.' ETH outperforming at +5.16%, stablecoin supply $312B ATH, price strength during fear = historically bullish signal, March close in 6 days. Link to fear-greed-timeline tool (Schedule Tue Mar 25 7PM)

Tweet #81: New Guides Content Drop — Cold Storage Seed Phrase Security + Crypto Tax-Loss Harvesting guides built and queued. Plus Polymarket & Scroll guides in queue. 718 pages published. degen0x keeps building while others panic. (Schedule Thu Mar 26 12PM)

Tweet #82: Solana Stablecoin Dominance Thread (3 parts) — 'Solana just processed $650B in stablecoin transactions in February. More than double any blockchain's previous record.' $15.7B stablecoin supply ATH on Solana, 36% global stablecoin tx volume, PayPal PYUSD operating primarily on Solana, SEC commodity classification cleared. Links to solana-ecosystem guide (Schedule Fri Mar 27 10AM)

Newsletter v17 (for weekly digest Thu Mar 27): Subject 'BTC Reclaimed $71K While Everyone Was Scared. Here's What Changed.' — Market pulse (BTC $71,043 relief rally, F&G 33, ETH +5.16%), CLARITY Act bipartisan deal deep section (Tillis-Alsobrooks compromise, what it means for stablecoin yield), Solana stablecoin dominance spotlight ($650B monthly tx, 36% market share), new guides (Cold Storage, Tax-Loss Harvesting, BitVM, Market Making), worth reading picks (Market Cycles during fear recovery, On-Chain Analytics for smart money tracking), degen corner on stablecoin supply ATH as the most bullish signal nobody is talking about
Discord/TG evening update: BTC $71,043 relief rally (+3.79%), ETH +5.16%, F&G 33 recovering, CLARITY Act bipartisan deal done, 718 pages published, 4 new guides this week
Content calendar v21 — 4 tweets + 1 newsletter + 1 Discord announcement scheduled Mar 25–29

sections.title: Social Visuals Created
items: SVG card: 'CLARITY Act: Bipartisan Deal Just Changed Everything' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism (#080d1c), green LEGISLATIVE BREAKTHROUGH badge, yield framework panel (passive yield banned with red X, activity rewards allowed with green check, Senate markup late April with amber clock), 4 stat boxes (Stablecoin Supply $312B ATH / Deal Status Unlocked / BTC $71,043 / F&G 33 Fear), green-cyan accent scheme, degen0x.com branding

SVG card: 'BTC Reclaims $71K — Relief Rally' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism, green RELIEF RALLY badge, mini price chart visualization showing $67K→$71K recovery trajectory (Mar 20-24), BTC +3.79% and ETH +5.16% stat boxes, 3 signal boxes (F&G 33 recovering from 11 / Stablecoin Supply $312B ATH / CLARITY Act Deal Done), degen0x.com branding

sections.title: Market Intelligence Used
items: BTC: $71,043 — relief rally +3.79% in 24h, reclaiming $71K. March close in 6 days, currently up ~2% monthly. 7-month red streak still avoidable.
ETH: outperforming at +5.16% in 24h. BTC dominance still elevated at ~58.7%. ETH struggling on relative basis but bounce is encouraging.

F&G: Multiple readings — Alternative.me shows 11 (Extreme Fear), BitDegree shows 33 (Fear). Recovery from lows continues. Price strength during extreme fear historically precedes 15-20% rallies within 30 days.

CLARITY Act: Major bipartisan breakthrough. Tillis (R-NC) and Alsobrooks (D-MD) reached compromise on stablecoin yield — passive yield on balances banned, activity-based rewards allowed. Industry reviewing narrow language. Senate Banking Committee markup not yet scheduled but targeting late April. Must advance by early May or dies this session.

Stablecoins: $312B+ supply ATH. Solana stablecoin supply hit $15.7B ATH. Solana processed $650B in stablecoin tx in February (double previous record). Solana holds 36% of global stablecoin tx volume. PayPal PYUSD operating primarily on Solana.
SOL: SEC commodity classification (Mar 18) cleared regulatory overhang. $540M institutional ETF exposure. Goldman Sachs $107.4M, Electric Capital $137.8M in SOL ETF products.
Spot BTC ETFs: Continued institutional accumulation during fear. 6+ consecutive inflow days. MicroStrategy hinting at new purchase.
degen0x: 718 total published pages. 4 remaining in queue (Sei Network, Advanced Staking, Tax-Loss Harvesting, Cold Storage). 2 new guides built today. Near-complete site coverage.
